## HistoryQuery class

This component renders a history query suggestion combining two buttons: one for selecting this suggestion as the search query, and another one to remove this query suggestion from the history queries.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class HistoryQuery extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [suggestion](./x-components.historyquery.suggestion.md) |  | HistoryQueryModel | The history query suggestion to render. |
